hero.headline: Effortless training management for coaches and athletes
hero.subheadline: The Synek app gives coaches a structured way to plan weekly training, and athletes can easily track and update their progress.
hero.betaNote: We're in beta and your feedback shapes what we build next.

whySynek.title: Why synek.app?
whySynek.subtitle: Simple and intuitive. Built from real collaboration between coaches and athletes.

card1.title: Structured weekly planning
card1.desc: Plan each week as a whole — load, type, and daily sessions — not just a list of workouts.

card2.title: Full coach visibility
card2.desc: Coaches see what athletes complete, how they feel, and where the plan needs adjusting.

card3.title: Athlete autonomy
card3.desc: Athletes can self-plan and log notes on every session.

card4.title: Beta built by users
card4.desc: We're actively building with early users. Your feedback directly drives what we add next.

features.title: What's inside
features.subtitle: Everything you need to run a structured training programme — nothing you don't.

item1.title: Weekly training planning
item1.desc: Plans are organised by training week. Add sessions by day, set load, and leave coaching notes.

item2.title: Sport-specific sessions
item2.desc: Run, cycling, strength, yoga, swimming, mobility, and rest — each with relevant fields.

item3.title: Coach & athlete roles
item3.desc: Coaches manage multiple athletes. Each athlete sees only their own plan.

item4.title: Self-planning mode
item4.desc: Coaches can enable athletes to plan their own weeks — useful for experienced athletes.

item5.title: Strava sync
item5.desc: Connect Strava to pull completed activities directly into your training log.

login.title: Log in to Synek
login.subtitle: Pick up where you left off.

beta.title: Join the Beta
beta.subtitle: Free access during beta. No credit card. No expiry.
beta.betaNote: You're joining during our public beta. That means free access and a direct line to the team — we read every piece of feedback.
beta.name: Full name
beta.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, one uppercase, one number
beta.selectRole: Please select Coach or Athlete before continuing
beta.emailAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Try logging in instead.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Got feedback, a question, or an idea? We're a small team and we read everything.
contact.betaNote: This is the fastest way to shape what we build next.
contact.name: Your name
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what you think, what's missing, or what could be better...
contact.submitSuccess: Message sent — thank you! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.submitError: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
